text.message: Can trade next one for nb

Cause if blue gets army it's over

You are sitting on a mono or vp
Haha you clearly don’t know what I have
Bro I never had a rb
Bro is making zero sense lmao
You're right, you didn't have a rb
OJ, blue can take road man
Bro black is about to take army
ok so blue ur on 8 then?
If he had the YOP, he could have taken road there.

Why loop around if you arn't planning a road steal

This game is about talking and analyzing the game in real time
I’m literally getting stolen from when I’m in last

ya but blue just wins this turn
